query: Project next week's inventory needs based on current stock levels
example: TimeSeriesPipe.from_dataframe(df) | lead(columns=['stock_level', 'sales_rate'], periods=7, time_column='date', group_columns=['warehouse_id', 'product_id'], suffix='_projected')

query: Forecast product demand for the next 14 days based on historical patterns
example: TimeSeriesPipe.from_dataframe(df) | lead(columns=['demand', 'orders_count'], periods=14, time_column='date', group_columns=['product_category', 'region'], suffix='_forecast')

query: Project future user acquisition numbers for the next month by channel
example: TimeSeriesPipe.from_dataframe(df) | lead(columns=['new_users', 'conversion_rate'], periods=30, time_column='date', group_columns=['acquisition_channel'], suffix='_projected')

query: Generate projected revenue figures for the next quarter by product line
example: TimeSeriesPipe.from_dataframe(df) | lead(columns=['revenue', 'units_sold', 'average_price'], periods=90, time_column='date', group_columns=['product_line'], suffix='_forecast')

query: Estimate next day's web traffic by hour for capacity planning
example: TimeSeriesPipe.from_dataframe(df) | lead(columns=['visitors', 'page_views', 'server_load'], periods=24, time_column='timestamp', group_columns=['website_section'], suffix='_forecast')

query: Compare current sales with previous week's performance by store
example: TimeSeriesPipe.from_dataframe(df) | lag(columns=['daily_sales', 'transaction_count', 'average_basket'], periods=7, time_column='date', group_columns=['store_id'], suffix='_previous_week')

query: Calculate month-over-month change in key performance indicators
example: TimeSeriesPipe.from_dataframe(df) | lag(columns=['revenue', 'active_users', 'acquisition_cost'], periods=1, time_column='month', group_columns=['business_unit'], suffix='_prev_month')

query: Compare today's website metrics with performance from 30 days ago
example: TimeSeriesPipe.from_dataframe(df) | lag(columns=['visitors', 'bounce_rate', 'conversion_rate', 'page_views'], periods=30, time_column='date', group_columns=['page_category'], suffix='_30d_prior')

query: Compare quarterly results with the same quarter last year by region
example: TimeSeriesPipe.from_dataframe(df) | lag(columns=['revenue', 'expenses', 'profit', 'customer_count'], periods=4, time_column='quarter', group_columns=['region'], suffix='_yoy')

query: Calculate week-over-week change in marketing campaign performance
example: TimeSeriesPipe.from_dataframe(df) | lag(columns=['impressions', 'clicks', 'conversions', 'spend'], periods=1, time_column='week', group_columns=['campaign_id'], suffix='_prev_week')

query: Analyze volatility in daily website traffic over the past month
example: TimeSeriesPipe.from_dataframe(df) | variance_analysis(columns=['visitors', 'page_views', 'conversion_rate'], method='rolling', window=7, time_column='date', suffix='_volatility')

query: Calculate standard deviation of sales by product category over time
example: TimeSeriesPipe.from_dataframe(df) | variance_analysis(columns=['sales', 'units_sold'], method='expanding', time_column='date', group_columns=['product_category'], suffix='_std')

query: Measure weekly fluctuations in customer order volume by region
example: TimeSeriesPipe.from_dataframe(df) | variance_analysis(columns=['order_count', 'order_value'], method='rolling', window=4, time_column='week', group_columns=['region'], suffix='_fluctuation')

query: Analyze hourly variability in server load for capacity planning
example: TimeSeriesPipe.from_dataframe(df) | variance_analysis(columns=['cpu_usage', 'memory_usage', 'request_count'], method='rolling', window=24, time_column='timestamp', group_columns=['server_id'], suffix='_variability')

query: Measure consistency of marketing performance across campaigns
example: TimeSeriesPipe.from_dataframe(df) | variance_analysis(columns=['impressions', 'clicks', 'conversions', 'ctr', 'cvr'], method='expanding', time_column='date', group_columns=['campaign_type'], suffix='_consistency')

query: Examine distribution of order values across different sales channels
example: TimeSeriesPipe.from_dataframe(df) | distribution_analysis(columns=['order_value'], bins=10, group_columns=['sales_channel'], normalize=True)

query: Analyze the distribution of page load times by device type
example: TimeSeriesPipe.from_dataframe(df) | distribution_analysis(columns=['load_time_ms'], bins=20, group_columns=['device_type'], normalize=False)

query: Create histograms of user session durations by user segment
example: TimeSeriesPipe.from_dataframe(df) | distribution_analysis(columns=['session_duration'], bins=15, group_columns=['user_segment'], normalize=True)

query: Analyze distribution of purchase amounts by customer age group
example: TimeSeriesPipe.from_dataframe(df) | distribution_analysis(columns=['purchase_amount'], bins=8, group_columns=['age_group'], normalize=True)

query: Compare the distribution of delivery times across different shipping methods
example: TimeSeriesPipe.from_dataframe(df) | distribution_analysis(columns=['delivery_time_hours'], bins=12, group_columns=['shipping_method'], normalize=False)

query: Calculate running total of new customer acquisitions by marketing channel
example: TimeSeriesPipe.from_dataframe(df) | cumulative_distribution(columns=['new_customers'], time_column='date', group_columns=['marketing_channel'], suffix='_cumulative')

query: Track cumulative revenue by product category since launch
example: TimeSeriesPipe.from_dataframe(df) | cumulative_distribution(columns=['revenue'], time_column='date', group_columns=['product_category'], suffix='_cumulative')

query: Generate cumulative user registrations by acquisition source over time
example: TimeSeriesPipe.from_dataframe(df) | cumulative_distribution(columns=['new_registrations'], time_column='date', group_columns=['acquisition_source'], suffix='_cumulative')

query: Calculate cumulative spend versus budget by department year-to-date
example: TimeSeriesPipe.from_dataframe(df) | cumulative_distribution(columns=['spend', 'budget'], time_column='date', group_columns=['department'], suffix='_ytd')

query: Track cumulative conversion rate by campaign over duration
example: TimeSeriesPipe.from_dataframe(df) | cumulative_distribution(columns=['conversions', 'impressions'], time_column='date', group_columns=['campaign_id'], suffix='_cumulative')

query: Apply custom seasonality adjustment to monthly sales data
example: TimeSeriesPipe.from_dataframe(df) | custom_calculation(lambda df: df.assign(sales_adjusted=df['sales'] / df['seasonal_factor']))

query: Calculate moving average convergence divergence (MACD) for sales trends
example: TimeSeriesPipe.from_dataframe(df) | custom_calculation(lambda df: df.assign(ema12=df['sales'].ewm(span=12).mean(), ema26=df['sales'].ewm(span=26).mean()).assign(macd=lambda d: d['ema12'] - d['ema26']))

query: Apply logarithmic transformation to skewed sales distribution data
example: TimeSeriesPipe.from_dataframe(df) | custom_calculation(lambda df: df.assign(log_sales=np.log1p(df['sales'])))

query: Calculate velocity and acceleration of growth metrics over time
example: TimeSeriesPipe.from_dataframe(df) | custom_calculation(lambda df: df.assign(growth_velocity=df['metric'].diff(), growth_acceleration=df['metric'].diff().diff()))

query: Apply custom weighting to combine multiple performance indicators
example: TimeSeriesPipe.from_dataframe(df) | custom_calculation(lambda df: df.assign(weighted_score=0.4*df['metric1'] + 0.3*df['metric2'] + 0.2*df['metric3'] + 0.1*df['metric4']))
